title: Aie's Paradox Pack (Cobblemon)
body:
This data pack features custom paradox Pokemon designed exclusively for this data pack.

Every Pokemon featured in this pack has a video on its design process to go along with it, the videos are viewable in the following playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ6H9yatchf83LhypTwoIbmnmXpiWP8zm




Feel free to use this data pack in servers as long as appropriate credit is given.

![Draconic Gills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WlA00rDp/images/c429f5d903b2372e773f341a59cfe7c71402602e.png)



Currently available Pokemon:


**Past Paradoxes:**


Paradox Applin *Devilish Fruit*
Spawns in: Beaches, Jungles

Paradox Mamoswine *Blistering Behemoth*
Spawns in: Tundra, Frozen Peaks, Ice Spikes

Paradox Wooper *Draconic Gills*
Spawns in: Swamps, Oceans, Lush Caves

Paradox Emboar *Combusting Temper*
Spawns in: Savanna

Paradox Genesect *Crawling Claws*
Spawns in: Ocean, Lush Caves

Paradox Ampharos *Jagged Fleece*
Spawns in: Plains

Paradox Gardevoir *Primevil Drake*
Spawns in Badlands

Paradox Copperajah *Rugged Trunk*
Spawns in Savanna

Paradox Omanyte *Arcane Helix*
Spawns in Oceans


**Future Paradoxes:**


Paradox Jirachi *Iron Dreamer*
Spawns in: Mountains

Paradox Wishiwashi *Iron Holo*
Spawns in: Oceans

Paradox Typhlosion *Iron Radiator*
Spawns in: Mountains

Paradox Ampharos *Iron Lightkeeper*
Spawns in: Beaches, Oceans

Paradox Kabuto *Iron Dome*
Spawns in Plains
